mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns following rate cuts show no statistical uplift over baseline (t-stat < 1.5) across 2005-2024 data.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden jump in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points within a single month signals acute labor market deterioration, triggering immediate equity sell-offs over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 55% of instances where UNRATE spikes > 0.4pp, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day SPX returns (out-of-sample accuracy < 52%) over any 5-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Contraction in the industrial production index during a late-cycle expansion phase indicates supply-side bottlenecks and profit margin compression, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during late-cycle phases produce positive 20-day SPX returns in > 60% of cases, or the mechanism predictive power vanishes outside late-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL reading above 3.5% triggers immediate equity sell-offs as markets anticipate restrictive monetary policy, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are positive in > 58% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 3.5%, or the signal loses statistical significance after 2020.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total employment combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, supporting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-UNRATE signal yields a Rank IC below 0.01 over rolling 3-year windows, or positive 20-day returns occur in < 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly declines in real GDP growth signal weakening aggregate demand that reduces corporate revenue forecasts, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: GDPC1 contractions are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in > 65% of cases, or the predictive correlation remains statistically indistinguishable from zero over 2005-2024.

mechanism_narrative: Improvements in the industrial production index during a post-recession recovery phase signal easing supply constraints and rising capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO improvements in recovery phases fail to predict positive 5-day SPX returns (accuracy < 51%) or the effect reverses direction in subsequent quarters.
